title: openclaw/openclaw
content: Your own personal AI assistant. Any OS. Any Platform. The lobster way. 🦞
summary: OpenClaw 是一个跨平台、跨操作系统的个人AI助手项目，以龙虾（🦞）为标志，强调灵活性和自主性。
highlights: Your own personal AI assistant.
Any OS. Any Platform.
The lobster way. 🦞

title: obra/superpowers
content: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.
summary: Superpowers 是一个代理技能框架和软件开发方法论，旨在提升开发效率和质量。
highlights: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.

title: n8n-io/n8n
content: Fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities. Combine visual building with custom code, self-host or cloud, 400+ integrations.
summary: n8n是一个公平代码的工作流自动化平台，具备原生AI能力，支持可视化构建与自定义代码结合，可自托管或使用云服务，拥有400多个集成。
highlights: Fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities.
Combine visual building with custom code, self-host or cloud, 400+ integrations.

title: affaan-m/ECC
content: The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.
summary: 一个针对Claude Code、Codex、Opencode、Cursor等AI编码代理的性能优化系统，涵盖技能、本能、记忆、安全及研究优先的开发方法。
highlights: Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development
for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond

title: Significant-Gravitas/AutoGPT
content: AutoGPT is the vision of accessible AI for everyone, to use and to build on. Our mission is to provide the tools, so that you can focus on what matters.
summary: AutoGPT 致力于让每个人都能访问和使用AI，提供工具以帮助用户专注于重要事务。
highlights: AutoGPT is the vision of accessible AI for everyone
Our mission is to provide the tools, so that you can focus on what matters.

title: ollama/ollama
content: Get up and running with Kimi-K2.5, GLM-5, MiniMax, DeepSeek, gpt-oss, Qwen, Gemma and other models.
summary: Ollama 是一个开源项目，旨在帮助用户快速启动和运行多种大型语言模型，包括 Kimi-K2.5、GLM-5、MiniMax、DeepSeek、gpt-oss、Qwen、Gemma 等。
highlights: Get up and running with Kimi-K2.5, GLM-5, MiniMax, DeepSeek, gpt-oss, Qwen, Gemma and other models.

title: anomalyco/opencode
summary: Anomalyco/OpenCode 是一个开源编码代理项目，旨在提供自动化的代码生成和辅助编程功能。
highlights: The open source coding agent.

title: AUTOMATIC1111/stable-diffusion-webui
summary: AUTOMATIC1111/stable-diffusion-webui 是一个基于 Gradio 库的 Stable Diffusion 模型网页界面，提供图像生成、编辑等功能，支持多种模型和扩展。
highlights: 基于 Gradio 的网页界面
支持多种 Stable Diffusion 模型
提供图像生成与编辑功能

title: f/prompts.chat
content: f.k.a. Awesome ChatGPT Prompts. Share, discover, and collect prompts from the community. Free and open source — self-host for your organization with complete privacy.
summary: f/prompts.chat 是一个开源项目，原名 Awesome ChatGPT Prompts，旨在让社区分享、发现和收集 ChatGPT 提示词，支持自托管以保护隐私。
highlights: Share, discover, and collect prompts from the community.
Free and open source — self-host for your organization with complete privacy.

title: huggingface/transformers
content: 🤗 Transformers: the model-definition framework for state-of-the-art machine learning models in text, vision, audio, and multimodal models, for both inference and training.
summary: Transformers 是一个用于文本、视觉、音频和多模态模型的最先进机器学习模型定义框架，支持推理和训练。
highlights: state-of-the-art machine learning models
text, vision, audio, and multimodal models
for both inference and training

title: Remove-AI-Watermarks – CLI and library for removing AI watermarks from images
content: Article URL: https://github.com/wiltodelta/remove-ai-watermarks Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48200569 Points: 378 # Comments: 252
summary: 一个用于从图像中移除AI水印的命令行工具和库，在Hacker News上获得378分和252条评论。
highlights: Remove-AI-Watermarks – CLI and library for removing AI watermarks from images
Points: 378
# Comments: 252

title: A new generation of [Google] ads for the AI era of Search
summary: Google 发布新一代搜索广告，适应 AI 时代的搜索体验变革。
highlights: A new generation of Google ads for the AI era of Search

title: I spent 31 hours on the math behind TurboQuant so you don't have to
summary: 文章详细解析了TurboQuant背后的数学原理，作者花费31小时研究并分享其核心算法与优化方法。
highlights: 作者花费31小时研究TurboQuant的数学原理
文章深入解析了TurboQuant的核心算法
提供了量化交易相关的技术优化方法

title: The next phase of OpenAI’s Education for Countries
content: OpenAI advances Education for Countries, expanding AI adoption in schools with new partnerships, teacher training, and tools to improve global learning outcomes.
summary: OpenAI 推进国家教育计划，通过新合作、教师培训和工具扩展AI在学校中的应用，以改善全球学习成果。
highlights: OpenAI advances Education for Countries
expanding AI adoption in schools with new partnerships
teacher training and tools to improve global learning outcomes

title: An OpenAI model has disproved a central conjecture in discrete geometry
content: An OpenAI model solved the 80-year-old unit distance problem, disproving a major conjecture in discrete geometry and marking a milestone in AI-driven mathematics.
summary: OpenAI模型解决了80年历史的单位距离问题，否定了离散几何中的一个主要猜想，标志着AI驱动数学的里程碑。
highlights: An OpenAI model solved the 80-year-old unit distance problem
disproving a major conjecture in discrete geometry
marking a milestone in AI-driven mathematics

title: OlmoEarth v1.1: A more efficient family of Earth observation models
summary: OlmoEarth v1.1 是 Allen AI 推出的地球观测模型系列，相比 v1.0 在效率、精度和推理速度上均有提升，支持多光谱和 SAR 数据，适用于土地覆盖分类、变化检测等遥感任务。
highlights: OlmoEarth v1.1 在保持高精度的同时，推理速度提升约 30%
支持多光谱和 SAR 数据融合，增强环境监测能力
在多个基准数据集上达到 state-of-the-art 性能

title: Introducing the Ettin Reranker Family
summary: Ettin Reranker 系列模型的介绍，包括其架构、训练方法、性能表现及在检索排序任务中的应用优势。
highlights: Ettin Reranker 系列模型在多个基准测试中表现优异。
该模型采用先进的架构设计，提升了排序准确性。
训练方法结合了监督学习和对比学习。
适用于信息检索和问答系统等场景。
